channel.title: Onboarding on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Onboarding on Systology

item.title: AI/ML Workshop
item.description: A carefully curated set of practical, highly reproducible machine learning examples (PyTorch, Hugging Face, NumPy) featuring MPS-aware benchmarks and rigorous experiment hygiene for local hardware.

item.title: Spark Trial
item.description: An intensive end-to-end ETL processing example leveraging Apache Spark for large-scale parquet datasets; deeply focusing on strict schema handling, optimal partitioning, and reproducible aggregations.

item.title: Video Analysis
item.description: An exploration of multimodal video feature extraction comparing Apple-native frameworks (Vision, AVFoundation, Core Image) against cross-platform C++/Python toolchains (OpenCV, pybind11) for ML prep.
